suggestedGuidanceUpdates.suggestion: Clarify that Windows workers should skip executing .factory/init.sh when mission guidance already says no setup is required, or provide a Windows-safe equivalent.
suggestedGuidanceUpdates.evidence: The handoff for worker session 7f864142-95e2-4b5a-9cc5-e1f10f4de5ac records a failed attempt to run the init script through Python and notes the deviation in skillFeedback, while mission.md and AGENTS.md already say no environment setup is required on this host.
